rows.label: qev011301_MSG0001
rows.name:
I'm in trouble...
This thing is completely broken...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0002
rows.name:
Sigh... I guess coming on an expedition this far out
all by myself was pushing it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0003
rows.name:
My SOS signal won't reach either...
What am I supposed to do...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_JNK0010
rows.name: Call Out

rows.label: qev011301_SEL0011
rows.name: Offer a helping hand to the woman at a loss.

rows.label: qev011301_JNK0020
rows.name: Leave Alone

rows.label: qev011301_SEL0021
rows.name: Let her keep talking to herself.

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0005
rows.name:
Um...
There's no way help would conveniently arrive like this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0006
rows.name: I must be seeing an illusion or a mirage.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0009
rows.name:
...Wait, you're actually there?!
A-Are you perhaps a BLADE member?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0010
rows.name:
Sigh... No matter how I look at it,
I can't fix this without swapping the parts...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0011
rows.name:
Am I just going to die here,
eaten by native creatures...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0013
rows.name:
...Wait, you're...!
Since when were you standing there?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0014
rows.name: A-Are you perhaps a BLADE member?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0015
rows.name:
Ah... Um...
I'm, well...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0016
rows.name:
I'm sorry, I'm bad at talking to people...
Please let me take a deep breath...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0018
rows.name:
...Okay, I should be fine now.
Um, I got attacked by native creatures around here...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0019
rows.name:
And my Doll got broken, and I don't have parts,
so I was completely at a loss... I'm sorry...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_JNK0110
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev011301_SEL0111
rows.name: Ask her if she doesn't have any teammates.

rows.label: qev011301_JNK0120
rows.name: Suggest

rows.label: qev011301_SEL0121
rows.name: Offer to help her if there's anything you can do.

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0020
rows.name:
Oh please, as if there's anyone who
would want to team up with someone like me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0021
rows.name:
I'm clumsy, I make tons of mistakes like this one...
And I'm bad at talking to people to begin with...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0022
rows.name: That's why I've been doing things as a lone wolf.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0024
rows.name: ...But... just...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0025
rows.name:
This time I'm really stuck...
Once your Doll breaks,
you really can't do anything alone...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0027
rows.name: ...Um... I know this is a shameless request, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0028
rows.name:
Could you please go fetch
the Doll parts I need?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0029
rows.name:
I'll pay you a reward, of course!
As long as I have the parts,
I think I can manage the repairs...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0030
rows.name:
Um... Is it a no after all?
I'm sorry for asking something so brazen.
Um... please just forget about it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0031
rows.name:
N-No way...! Making you spare your precious time
for someone like me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0032
rows.name:
...I'm clumsy, and I didn't want to be a burden on anyone,
so I've been working as a lone wolf without making friends.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0033
rows.name: To think you'd...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0035
rows.name:
...No... But with my Doll broken now,
I really can't do anything alone...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0036
rows.name:
I'll reward you as best as I can.
If you're willing to help...
Could you gather some Doll parts for me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0037
rows.name:
As long as I have the parts,
I can manage the repairs on my own... Please.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0038
rows.name:
Even before you accepted my request...
Thank you for just talking to someone like me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0039
rows.name:
Thank you so much!
It's been so long since I've talked to someone, it was really fun...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0040
rows.name:
Um... the parts I need are
Silky Body Fluid and
Quogol's Silver Clay...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0041
rows.name:
You can do it whenever you have time, so...
Please get them for me, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0042
rows.name:
Until you get back,
I think I'll investigate around here
to see if I can find any rare collection items...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0043
rows.name:
Despite how I look, I'm actually a
pretty capable Collepedian, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0044
rows.name:
Um... so there's no need to rush.
Take your time, whenever you're free is fine...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0045
rows.name:
Please get the Silky Body Fluid
and Quogol's Silver Clay for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0046
rows.name:
Ah! [ST:playername ]-san!
It's amazing!
I was taking a walk around here earlier, and...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0047
rows.name:
I found a super rare collection item—
Dobobora Broccoli![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0048
rows.name:
This is something various Collepedian teams
searched for but couldn't find, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0049
rows.name:
This mission was a total disaster,
but at least I can be a little useful to BLADE with this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_JNK0210
rows.name: Praise

rows.label: qev011301_SEL0211
rows.name: Praise Mei and rejoice in her good luck.

rows.label: qev011301_JNK0220
rows.name: Object

rows.label: qev011301_SEL0221
rows.name: Tell her it's meaningless if her Doll is still broken.

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0050
rows.name: Hehe... Thank you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0051
rows.name:
But it really is meaningless if I don't
fix my Doll and make it back alive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0052
rows.name:
Ah... I was just so happy...
Even though I'm completely relying on you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0053
rows.name:
That's why I'm no good...
I'm really sorry...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0055
rows.name:
Um... so did you find
the Doll parts?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0056
rows.name:
Wow...! This is perfect!
I can start the repairs right away with this![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0057
rows.name:
I managed to get this prototype Doll
at a huge discount by chance, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0058
rows.name:
It's actually a really expensive Doll
that someone like me normally couldn't afford.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0059
rows.name:
I'm so glad I can finally see a way to fix it.
Um... so for your reward...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0060
rows.name:
Oh, right! Money alone isn't enough,
so please take this Dobobora Broccoli too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0061
rows.name:
...It's fine! I just found it by chance anyway,
and it'll definitely be more useful for BLADE
if a capable person like you holds onto it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0063
rows.name:
Thank you!
I think I can manage on my own from here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0064
rows.name:
Please don't worry about me,
and return to your original mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0065
rows.name:
Um... I'm really sorry
for causing you so much trouble![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_JNK0310
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev011301_SEL0311
rows.name: Express concern over whether she'll be okay alone.

rows.label: qev011301_JNK0320
rows.name: Encourage

rows.label: qev011301_SEL0321
rows.name:
Support Mei's attitude of doing her best
as a lone wolf on missions.

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0066
rows.name:
I can't get in the way of an excellent explorer
like you any longer...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0067
rows.name:
Besides, I've always done things alone up until now.
I'm sure I'll manage somehow...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0068
rows.name: I'll be fine! Please go![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0069
rows.name:
I'll survive alone on Mira
without being a burden to anyone![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0070
rows.name:
That's the first time anyone has ever said that to me.
Those words are wasted on someone like me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0072
rows.name:
Um... I'll do my best!
I might not be able to match the people
working hard in teams, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0073
rows.name:
I'll do everything I can within my own limits
and contribute to BLADE![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0074
rows.name:
Well then, if we ever have the chance to meet again,
please... talk to me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011301_MSG0075
rows.name:
May fortune smile upon your explorations—
I'll be praying for you![ST:wait ]
